gt_sql: SELECT T3.power_name FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN hero_power AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.hero_id INNER JOIN superpower AS T3 ON T3.id = T2.power_id INNER JOIN gender AS T4 ON T4.id = T1.gender_id WHERE T4.gender = 'Male' LIMIT 5
pred_sql:
SELECT sp.power_name
FROM superhero s
JOIN gender g ON s.gender_id = g.id
JOIN hero_power hp ON s.id = hp.hero_id
JOIN superpower sp ON hp.power_id = sp.id
WHERE g.gender = 'Male'
LIMIT 5;
question: List down at least five superpowers of male superheroes.
